description: This file defines a React component for an Alerts page in a frontend application. It manages state for alerts, loading, errors, and work order creation, and interacts with backend APIs to list alerts and create work orders. It renders a UI with alert information, refresh controls, and action buttons.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Fetches the latest alerts from the server and updates the component state.

methods.name: onCreateWorkOrder
methods.description: Creates a work order based on a specific alert ID, updates state with the created work order, and refreshes alert list.
